[searchCheapestResult][Get Cheapest Routes][From: nanjing, To: shanghai, Num: 5, Date: 2026-05-18]

/* <criteria> */ select
        cr1_0.consign_record_id,
        cr1_0.user_id,
        cr1_0.consignee,
        cr1_0.from_place,
        cr1_0.handle_date,
        cr1_0.order_id,
        cr1_0.consign_record_phone,
        cr1_0.consign_record_price,
        cr1_0.target_date,
        cr1_0.to_place,
        cr1_0.weight 
    from
        consign_record cr1_0
